failedAssertions.reason: Targeted `npm test -- parity.test.ts` failed consistently in isolated validation: the step `idempotent activate: both CLI and MCP report alreadyInState for already-active skill` raised `AssertionError: expected false to be true` because the CLI result reported `alreadyInState=false`. See `.factory/validation/e2e-polish/user-testing/flows/e2e-parity-error.json`.

appliedUpdates.description: Added e2e-polish harness notes documenting targeted `tests/e2e/*.test.ts` validation, required serial execution, and raw artifact capture expectations.
Added `Flow Validator Guidance: e2e-vitest` covering serial execution, scope boundaries, and artifact/report expectations for shipped E2E test files.
